notes: Track A G4 partial — natural-language addressing surface live PASS (mention-based message submitted, bot matched reply with task-id lookup). /focus binding semantics not exercised: natural-language router did task-id lookup ("Task discord-task-2d87180e is already terminal. Outcome: success.") rather than session-binding via /focus. /focus and /unfocus require slash-command modes (script lacks these). Structural readiness for /focus + /unfocus: handlers wired in src/discord/discord-command-handlers.ts (handleFocus 1073-1171, handleUnfocus 1173-1197), session-binding in src/discord/discord-session-binding.ts, spec tests in tests/subagent-operator-session-binding.spec.ts (PASS). Recommended follow-up: extend scripts/agent-node-discord-direct-control.mjs with slash-focus and slash-unfocus modes to enable Peekaboo MCP G4 full live drive.
